The '''''Dead Ringer''''' was the [[Transport/Legends|transport]] of [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Captain/Legends|captain]] [[Bioto]]. [[Cash Garrulan]] smuggled two refugees fleeing [[Murkhana/Legends|Murkhana]] aboard the ''Dead Ringer'', simultaneously using the "stow-aways" as stand-ins for [[Olee Starstone]] and [[Roan Shryne]] and also setting up his rival Bioto for the fall. The ''Ringer'' was impounded by the ''[[Exactor/Legends|Exactor]]'' when [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] was attempting to intercept Starstone and Shryne as they fled Murkhana. Vader had Bioto, his crew, and the stowaways put in the brig.

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Lord: The Rise of Darth Vader]]'' {{Ab|Dark Lord: The Rise of Darth Vader (unabridged audiobook)}}
